title: Roman Numerals+
description: Changes Minecraft enchants that are above level 10 to show "XXI" instead of "enchantment.level.21"
body:
## **Roman Numerals+**

Adds extra roman numerals to enchantment/potion effects above 10 _(Currently until level 101 )_ so instead of showing "Sharpness enchantment.level.10" it would show "Sharpness X"

When going into a version that isnt 1.20.2 it will show that the pack is made for a newer/older version of minecraft **THIS DOESNT AFFECT ANYTHING AND IT WILL WORK THE SAME**

If there are any Ideas, Feedback or bug reports DM 4_Square on Discord or send a message through the CurseForge messaging system to [4_Square](https://www.curseforge.com/members/4_square/projects)
